prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **Audi 4.2L V8 (engine code: 4200cc DOHC 40V, internal designation: BYK/BNS)** with a **Motec M150 ECU** for full standalone management, replacing the stock Bosch ME7.1.1 system. Port-matched cylinder heads with **Ferrea Competition Series valves (intake: 36.5mm, exhaust: 31.5mm)** and **Supertech dual valve springs** to support 9,000 RPM redline. Custom **Titanium retainers and lash caps** to reduce valvetrain mass.

Forced induction via **Rotrex C38-91 centrifugal supercharger** (12 psi max boost) with a **custom billet aluminum intake manifold** (designed by **SPM Performance**) and **Siemens 2000cc/min injectors**. Intercooled with a **PWR dual-core heat exchanger** and **AEM 340lph in-tank fuel pump** with **Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator** for consistent 60 psi rail pressure.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **Tilton 7.25" triple-plate carbon clutch** with **AP Racing hydraulic slave cylinder**, **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (85% lockup), and **custom 3.91:1 final drive ratio** (replacing stock 3.69:1) for optimized acceleration. **GKN tripod CV joints** and **Penske 8760 adjustable shock absorbers** with **Eibach ERS coilovers** (2-way adjustable rebound/damping) for track-focused handling.
estetica: Full **Aerocivic Spyker C8-specific widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 3-piece construction) with **custom 3D-scanned OEM-matched fitment**, extending fenders by 50mm per side. **Vorsteiner V-FF107 20x10" (front) and 20x12" (rear) forged wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear)** for staggered grip.

Custom **Spyker-branded titanium exhaust system** (designed by **Capristo**) with **Inconel 625 headers**, **dual 3.5" straight-pipe configuration**, and **removable butterfly valves** for adjustable sound levels. **Aeromotions active rear wing** (carbon fiber, 3-position adjustable) with **Gurney flap** for downforce tuning (up to 180 kg at 160 mph).

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position carbon-Kevlar seats** (SPYKER-embroidered headrests), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm diameter, Alcantara-wrapped with **SPYKER titanium shift paddles**), and **Alcantara-wrapped dashboard** (matching original Laviolette stitching). **Custom titanium roll cage** (designed by **Sparco**) with **6-point harnesses (Schroth Profi II-6)** and **fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)** for FIA compliance.
